character_dossiers.name: Jim
character_dossiers.biography: Fled from murderers, encountered Ben Gunn, and discussed survival and escape plans.

character_dossiers.name: Ben Gunn
character_dossiers.biography: Marooned for three years, survived on goats and berries, encountered Jim.

character_dossiers.name: Silver
character_dossiers.biography: Ringleader of mutineers, killed Tom, and engaged in murder.

character_dossiers.name: Long John
character_dossiers.biography: Owner of Flint's ship, referenced in Ben Gunn's dialogue.

character_dossiers.name: Flint
character_dossiers.biography: Dead pirate associated with Silver and the mutineers.

character_dossiers.name: the squire
character_dossiers.biography: Liberal benefactor mentioned in Jim's dialogue.

character_dossiers.name: the doctor
character_dossiers.biography: Member of the group mentioned in Jim's internal thoughts.
